name: Maria Lopez
text: Absolutely loved working with them! Our new website brought in 3x more online orders within the first month. Professional, fast, and truly listened to what we needed.

name: James Carter
text: We needed a polished, trustworthy site for our law firm and that's exactly what we got. The attention to detail was impressive — clients constantly compliment our website.

name: Sofia Reyes
text: From concept to launch in under 2 weeks! The site looks stunning on mobile and desktop. Our class bookings have gone up significantly since the redesign.

name: Daniel Kim
text: Super easy to communicate with and delivered exactly what we envisioned. The portfolio site they built for us gets compliments from every client we share it with.

name: Priya Nair
text: I was skeptical about hiring a freelancer but this was the best decision I made. Transparent pricing, zero surprises, and a beautiful end result. Will hire again.

name: Tom & Rachel Briggs
text: Our little bed and breakfast finally has a website we're proud of! Guests always say they booked because the site felt so warm and inviting. Worth every penny.
